title: SafeFarmland
description: A simple mod for protecting farmland, compatible with most modded farmlands.
body:
# SafeFarmland

A simple mod for protecting farmland, compatible with most modded farmlands, including **Aquaculture 2**.

Protects farmland from being trampled by players and mobs.

## Commands

- `/sf debug` - Toggle debug messages (you will get a message when stepping on farmland)
- `/sf toggle` - Toggle farmland protection
